title: LogoSynch
text: LogoSynch Determines whether the logo screen and the Uniface application are launched in parallel or in sequence. LogoSynch { = } off | on Arguments off —the Uniface application is lauched at the same time as the logo window is started. on —the startup logo is displayed first, followed by the Uniface application. Defaults Default value: off File Section: [application] Description The time that the logo is displayed is determined by the LogoTime setting. Thus if LogoSynch is set on , the Uniface application will not start until this time has elapsed and the logo window has closed. Note: Set LogoSynchon if Uniface appears to hang or crash when the startup logo (splash screen) is enabled. Related Links Logo Specifies the name of an image file to be used as the application splash screen logo. This setting applies only to the Uniface runtime on Windows, not to the Uniface IDE. LogoTime Specifies the time, in seconds, that the splash screen logo is displayed. This setting applies only to the Uniface runtime on Windows, not to the Uniface IDE. Was this topic helpful?
